MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-16-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. CROSS DEFENDANT CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.'s MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT is off calendar as moot. On January 10, 2014, defendant dismissed the cross-complaint. This order is without prejudice as to plaintiff/cross-defendant attempting to recover fees/costs by motion. See Law Offices of Andrew L. Ellis v. Yang (2009) 178 Cal.App.4th 869, 878-879. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
